title: athyrium irriguum
intro: Athyrium irriguum, also known as Himalayan maidenhair fern, is a species of flowering plant in the fern family, native to the Himalayas. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Athyrium irriguum include reducing stress, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. The plant is commonly prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of ailments, including fever, coughs, and respiratory issues.
